commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer label and HOME/credential boundary semantics need maintainer signoff; no narrow ClawSweeper repair defect was found.; Cleared: No supply-chain or unrelated security regression was found; the only security-relevant change is the intentional HOME inheritance behavior, which needs maintainer approval. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Codex app-server auth bridge so stdio launches still set per-agent `CODEX_HOME` but no longer synthesize `HOME` unless explicitly supplied, with matching tests, docs, and changelog text.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main injects a synthetic `HOME` for stdio Codex app-server launches, and the PR body supplies before/after real `openclaw agent --local` output. I did not run the smoke locally because this review kept the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer label and HOME/credential boundary semantics need maintainer signoff; no narrow ClawSweeper repair defect was found.
